---
title: "test_api_precedence.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_api_precedence.py"
loc: 59
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.05
style_score: 3.44
intel_score: 8.18
overall_score: 4.26
---

## Intent
The `test_api_precedence.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestAPIKeyPrecedence, test_bridge_unsets_env_vars_when_no_api_key, test_bridge_sets_env_vars_when_api_key_provided, test_uplink_fallback_logic, test_uplink_no_fallback_if_init_key_provided. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestAPIKeyPrecedence, test_bridge_unsets_env_vars_when_no_api_key, test_bridge_sets_env_vars_when_api_key_provided, test_uplink_fallback_logic, test_uplink_no_fallback_if_init_key_provided. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `TestAPIKeyPrecedence`
- `test_bridge_unsets_env_vars_when_no_api_key`
- `test_bridge_sets_env_vars_when_api_key_provided`
- `test_uplink_fallback_logic`
- `test_uplink_no_fallback_if_init_key_provided`
